[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Pallin''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] who was stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Sedra]]. The lieutenant was known to have cooperated with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] agent [[Jan Ors]] in stopping a series of slave raids being conducted by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and [[Peace Brigade]]rs.

==Behind the scenes==
Early scripts of "[[Equals & Opposites]]" had named this character Lieutenant Ducce, which was meant to be pronounced "Doo-chuh", but writer Nathan P. Butler decided that it would be far too easy for fans to read "Ducce" and pronounce it like a certain feminine hygiene product. The name was promptly changed.<ref name="ChronoRadio">''[http://www.starwarsfanworks.com/chronoradio/crse2.html ChronoRadio: Special Edition II: The Making of a Tale]'' (50.36)</ref>
